summary: Comprehensive testing of rep-driven student enrollment workflow completed successfully. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified Rep Portal (dashboard, student registration, document upload) and Admin Portal (dashboard, applications list, document review, application approval). Core workflow verified: Rep registers student (inactive account) → Rep uploads documents → Rep submits for review → Admin approves documents → Admin approves application (activates account, generates enrollment number) → Student can login.
passed_tests: Backend: Admin login works correctly
Backend: Rep login works correctly
Backend: Approved student can login (is_active=true)
Backend: Rep dashboard stats endpoint (GET /api/rep/dashboard/stats)
Backend: Rep register student creates inactive account (POST /api/rep/students)
Backend: Rep get students list (GET /api/rep/students)
Backend: Rep upload all 5 required documents (POST /api/rep/students/:id/documents)
Backend: Rep submit for review (POST /api/rep/students/:id/submit-review)
Backend: Admin dashboard stats endpoint (GET /api/admin/dashboard/stats)
Backend: Admin get pending documents (GET /api/admin/documents/pending)
Backend: Admin approve document (PATCH /api/admin/documents/:id/approve)
Backend: Admin reject document (PATCH /api/admin/documents/:id/reject)
Backend: Admin get applications list (GET /api/admin/applications)
Backend: Admin approve application activates account (PATCH /api/admin/applications/:id/approve)
Backend: Student can login after approval
Backend: Rep endpoints require authentication
Backend: Admin endpoints require authentication
Backend: Rep cannot access admin-only endpoints (403)
Backend: Inactive student cannot login (403 ACCOUNT_INACTIVE)
Frontend: Rep Portal - Login redirects to /portal/rep
Frontend: Rep Portal - Dashboard shows stats (Total Students, Docs Pending, Under Review, Approved, Enrolled)
Frontend: Rep Portal - Register Student form with all fields (name, email, whatsapp, dob, city, state, dental_reg, experience)
Frontend: Rep Portal - My Students list with status filters
Frontend: Rep Portal - Student detail page with Application Progress
Frontend: Rep Portal - Student detail shows Required Documents with status badges
Frontend: Rep Portal - Document rejection reason displayed
Frontend: Admin Portal - Login redirects to /portal/admin
Frontend: Admin Portal - Dashboard shows 6 stats including Total Revenue
Frontend: Admin Portal - Applications list with search and status filter
Frontend: Admin Portal - Application detail shows Student Information
Frontend: Admin Portal - Application detail shows Documents with approve/reject actions
Frontend: Admin Portal - Enrollment number format P4G-YYYY-XXXX displayed
Frontend: Admin Portal - Account Status shows 'Inactive (Pending Approval)' for unapproved students
seed_data_creation: Test students created during pytest run with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: Rep-driven workflow fully tested. Students start with is_active=false. After admin approves application, is_active=true and student can login. Enrollment number format: P4G-YYYY-XXXX. Required documents: bds_degree, tenth_marksheet, twelfth_marksheet, passport_photo, id_proof. Student status lifecycle: registered → documents_uploaded → under_review → approved → payment_pending → enrolled. All 3rd party integrations (Stripe, S3, SendGrid, Twilio) are MOCKED.

mocked_integrations_notes.aws_s3: Document upload returns mock S3 URLs (plan4growth-student-documents.s3.amazonaws.com)
mocked_integrations_notes.stripe: Payments are MOCKED - simulates payment flow
mocked_integrations_notes.sendgrid: Email notifications MOCKED - logs to console
mocked_integrations_notes.twilio: WhatsApp notifications MOCKED - logs to console

workflow_verification.application_approval_activates_account: Verified - is_active changes from false to true
